_meta.row_shape: {element, services[], type: rest|mcp, auth_required, description} — per SA-031 §7
_meta.home: Rung-1 staging: this index ships as Element data in rasa.module.connectors. It moves to registry-public/connectors.json when that repo initializes (Phase 8), and is served at GET /v1/connections/catalog under SA-031. One source of truth at a time — while it lives here, here wins.

connectors.description: GitHub REST API v3 — repos, issues, search. Bearer PAT by secret name (github-pat); unauthenticated public reads work at 60 req/hr.
Open-Meteo weather — geocoding, forecasts, current conditions. No API key required for non-commercial use.
